/usr/bin/ar qc liblslidar_driver.a CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lsiosr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lslidar_ch_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lslidar_cx_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lslidar_ls_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lslidar_x10_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lslidar_services.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lslidar_driver.dir/src/lslidar_device_info.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblslidar_driver.a
